messages.content: # Getting the error “ Failed to launch the race : This server requires functioning steam ”? Read this guide.

# Pirated versions are NOT supported
> No Hesi does not and will not support any pirated content in any way shape or form.
> Pirated copies are illegal and run the risk of viruses as well as being prone to more errors.

## What should I do?
> You will need to follow <#1437114487051255858> to fully delete the Pirated Assetto Corsa, Content Manager and any mods you have installed.

> Next, follow our guide on how to buy Assetto Corsa at a discounted price: <#1322214135080947752> 

> Once you have purchased the game legitimately, follow <#985372285668036639>
